name: v-retriever
paperTitle: V-Retriever: Evidence-Driven Agentic Reasoning for Universal Multimodal Retrieval
content:
## Introduction

Instead of one-shot retrieval, agent iteratively refines query based on evidence, improving result quality. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Instead of one-shot retrieval, agent iteratively refines query based on evidence, improving result quality.

## Architecture Overview

```
Input
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 1]
  │   └─ Main computation
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 2]
  │   └─ Refinement
  │
  └─→ Output
```
